query:
INSERT INTO
            leaf_aggregation_witness_jobs_fri (
                l1_batch_number,
                chain_id,
                priority,
                circuit_id,
                closed_form_inputs_blob_url,
                number_of_basic_circuits,
                protocol_version,
                status,
                created_at,
                updated_at,
                protocol_version_patch,
                batch_sealed_at
            )
            VALUES
            (
                $1,
                $2,
                $3,
                $4,
                $5,
                $6,
                $7,
                'waiting_for_proofs',
                NOW(),
                NOW(),
                $8,
                $9
            )
            ON CONFLICT (l1_batch_number, chain_id, circuit_id) DO
            UPDATE
            SET
                updated_at = NOW()
